summary: Full E2E testing of OmniverseOS. Backend 13/13 pytest cases pass (auth signup/login/me, all CRUD: notes/tasks/events/transactions/memories/files, analytics summary, AI chat non-stream + history, AI image gen via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY). Frontend: login with demo credentials succeeds, Dashboard renders, all 5 tested dock items (chat/notes/tasks/calendar/finance) open windows, Cmd+K command palette opens, Notes 'new' and Tasks 'add' buttons functional, logout returns to auth screen. No page errors. App is production-ready for v1.

minor.issue: Token returned via signup is valid but signup response is not idempotent - duplicate emails return 400 (expected). No issue, just noted.
Missing PUT/update endpoints (only POST/GET/DELETE). Edits require delete+recreate.

issues: Multiple windows open at default cascade positions overlap heavily (visible in screenshot). Consider smarter window placement.

action_items: Optional: add PUT endpoints for events/transactions/memories/files for parity with notes/tasks
Optional: align frontend logout testid - currently 'logout-btn' (works); review_request mentioned no specific id but consider standardising naming (e.g., 'topbar-logout')
Optional: improve window cascade so newly opened windows don't fully overlap
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 479-line monolith - acceptable for v1 but recommend splitting into routers/{auth,ai,crud,analytics}.py as features grow
JWT_SECRET has a default fallback value in code; for production should fail-fast if env missing
AI image gen endpoint has no rate limiting / size cap on prompt - could be abused
MongoDB _id consistently excluded via projection - good
All env access uses os.environ correctly; REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL used by frontend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers all critical paths including real AI chat + image gen (takes ~20s total). Frontend dock testids follow pattern dock-item-{appname}. Logout testid is 'logout-btn' (not 'logout-button'). Command palette testid is 'command-palette'. AuthScreen testids: auth-email-input, auth-password-input, auth-submit-button. Mocked services (Spotify/YouTube/Netflix/Discord) use static seed data by design.
